Thank you.

You’re now part of a community that grows through collaboration 🤝 Click to explore the Getting Started Guide and start participating in $t(common.spaces) where every insight helps us all move forward.
Questions? Email support@alkem.io
USER_SIGN_UP_WELCOME.subject: Welcome to Alkemio! 🎉

outsideOfSpace.contributors: Here you can find all people and $t(common.organizations) that are contributing on Alkemio, also in $t(common.spaces) that are not selected by {{space}}. Enjoy connecting!
outsideOfSpace.forum: This is the general Alkemio $t(common.forum), outside of the {{space}} $t(common.space). You are very much invited to explore and contribute!
outsideOfSpace.subspaces: Here you can find all $t(common.subspaces) that are hosted on Alkemio, also the ones that are not selected by {{space}}. Enjoy exploring!

messages.claim-missing: You haven't verified your Cleverbase identity. Please verify your identity and try again or try another sign up method.
messages.invalid-credentials: The email address or password you inserted is invalid. Please check your credentials and try again. Are you trying to sign up instead? You can do so by clicking the link above.
messages.login-flow-account-exists: This email is already associated with an $t(common.account). If you previously signed up via LinkedIn, GitHub, or Microsoft, please use that login method. Otherwise, reset your password.
messages.oidc-account-linking-conflict: You tried to sign in with {{provider}}, but that email is already used by another account.
messages.recovery-flow-expired: Der Bestätigungslink ist abgelaufen. Bitte fordern Sie einen neuen an, indem Sie Ihre E-Mail erneut senden.
messages.request-recover-password:
An email containing a recovery link has been sent to the email address you provided.

If you have not received an email, please check the following:

  • Check the spelling of the email address.
  • Ensure you are using the email address you registered with.
  • Check your spam or junk folder in case the email was filtered.
  • If you registered using LinkedIn, Microsoft, or another social login, password recovery via email will not work. Please use the respective social login option instead.


    • Note: This does not confirm that an $t(common.account) is registered with this email.
messages.successfully-recovered-password: Bitte geben Sie innerhalb der nächsten 15 Minuten ein neues Passwort ein, um Ihr Passwort zurückzusetzen.
messages.verification-flow-expired: Der Bestätigungslink ist abgelaufen. Bitte fordern Sie einen neuen an, indem Sie Ihre E-Mail erneut senden.

notifications.pack-error: An error occurred while creating the $t(common.innovationPack).

innovation-packs.save-new-for-details: Save the new $t(common.innovationPack) to edit the rest of the details

preferences.title: $t(common.Membership):$t(common.subspaces):$t(common.subspaces)

notifications.errorCreatingSpace: An error occurred while creating the $t(common.space).

defaultSpaceTemplate.description:
Customize the default $t(common.template) for newly created $t(common.subspaces).

Below you can choose between the $t(common.templates) collected in the $t(common.space) $t(common.templateLibrary). If you're looking to create new $t(common.templates) or explore additional $t(common.templates), click here to access this library.
defaultSpaceTemplate.title: Change Default $t(common.subspace) $t(common.template)

defaultSettings.description: Choose the default $t(common.settings) that will apply when creating a new $t(common.subspace) within this $t(common.space). These $t(common.settings) can be modified during the creation process or at a later time.
defaultSettings.title: Default $t(common.subspace) $t(common.template)

subspaces.description: Here you can edit the $t(common.subspaces) in this $t(common.space).

copySpace.createTemplateTooltip: To create a $t(common.template) from this $t(common.subspace), you need $t(common.space) $t(common.admin) permissions.
copySpace.description: To utilize this $t(common.subspace) setup, you can either duplicate it within the same $t(common.space) or save it as a $t(common.template) for use across the platform. In both scenarios, the $t(common.innovation-flow) and all $t(common.posts) will be replicated. Please note that $t(common.comments) or contributions to a tool will not be included in the $t(common.template) or duplicated $t(common.subspace).
copySpace.title: Copy $t(common.subspace)

memberActions.createBlocks: Create $t(common.posts): Allow $t(common.members) to create $t(common.posts). If you deactivate this, $t(common.members) will still be able to contribute to existing $t(common.posts), but will not be able to create new $t(common.posts).
memberActions.createSubspaces: Create $t(common.subspaces): Allow $t(common.members) to create $t(common.subspaces) in this $t(common.space). If you deactivate this, you can still create $t(common.subspaces) yourself and add other people as an $t(common.admin) inside the $t(common.subspace).
memberActions.eventsFromSubspaces: $t(common.subspace) events: Allow events from $t(common.subspaces) to be visible on this $t(common.space) calendar as well.
memberActions.guestContributions: Guest Contributions: Allow $t(common.whiteboards) in this $t(common.space) to be shared with guest users (non-members) for collaborative contributions.
memberActions.inheritRights: Allow $t(common.members) of the parent $t(common.community) to contribute without needing to join first.
memberActions.supportAsAdmin: Alkemio Support: Allow the Alkemio Support team to act as an $t(common.admin) in this $t(common.space).
memberActions.title: Mitglieder-Aktionen
memberActions.videoCall: Video Call: Show video call button in the tab menu. All members of this Space can use this button to start a Jitsi video conference. Read more about Jitsi here.

membership.allowSubspaceAdminsToInviteMembers: $t(common.space) invitations: Allow $t(common.admins) of $t(common.subspaces) to invite users to their $t(common.subspace). Users who were not yet a $t(common.member) of this $t(common.space), will become so when they accept the $t(common.subspace) invitation.
membership.allowSubspaceAdminsToInviteMembersSubspa: $t(common.space) invitations: Allow $t(common.admins) of $t(common.subspaces) within this $t(common.subspace) to invite users directly to their own $t(common.subspace). If a user is not yet a $t(common.member) of this $t(common.subspace), they will automatically become one upon accepting the invitation. Note: Only users who are already $t(common.members) of the $t(common.space) can be invited this way.
membership.applications: Application required: If people want to become a $t(common.member), they have to fill in the application form. You receive their applications (see $t(common.community) tab here) and can choose to accept these or not. If you want, you can choose to leave the form empty.
membership.hostOrganizationJoin: Host $t(common.organization): Allow people who are associated with {{host}} to directly join, without having to apply or be invited.
membership.invitations: Invitation only: Users can only become a $t(common.member) after you’ve invited them (which you can do from the $t(common.community) tab here) or if they are added manually. There is no Apply or Join button for others to click.
membership.open: No Application required: All $t(common.space) $t(common.members) can directly join, without you having to review their application.
membership.title: $t(common.Membership):$t(common.subspaces):$t(common.subspaces)

settings.updateFailed: An error occurred while updating the $t(common.settings). Please try again later.

visibility.membershipWarning: Please note that users can join this {{entity}} without explicit approval. You can change this in the membership settings below.
visibility.private: Private: This $t(common.space) is visible to everyone on the platform, but the content is only visible to $t(common.members). Please note that both the information in the $t(common.profile) and the context are publicly visible.
visibility.privateSubspace: Private: This $t(common.subspace) is visible to all $t(common.members) of the $t(common.space), but its contents are restricted and can only be accessed by $t(common.members) of the $t(common.subspace).
visibility.public: Public: This $t(common.space) and its contents are visible for everyone on the platform. Users can only contribute if they are a $t(common.member).
visibility.publicSubspace: Public: This $t(common.subspace) and all its contents are visible to everyone who has access to the $t(common.space) it belongs to. If the $t(common.space) itself is public, this $t(common.subspace) and its contents will be visible to all users, including those outside the $t(common.space).
visibility.title: Sichtbarkeit

autoInvite.label: Send invitations to community members who are already in the destination space
autoInvite.messagePlaceholder: Your space has been moved. You are invited to rejoin the community.
autoInvite.tooltip: After the move, all community roles are cleared. This option sends an invitation to members who already belong to the destination space, so they can rejoin the moved subspace without having to find it themselves.

demoteL1ToL2.confirmWarning: This will demote the subspace under the selected parent. All community members (users, organizations, and virtual contributors) will be REMOVED. Admin roles will be reset. This action cannot be easily undone.
demoteL1ToL2.hint: All community members, leads, organizations, and virtual contributors will be removed. Only user admins are preserved. This is the most destructive conversion.
demoteL1ToL2.noTargets: No other subspaces exist in this space to serve as a parent.

moveL1ToL0.confirmWarning: This will move the subspace and all its content to the target Space. All community roles will be cleared. Innovation flow states may be remapped. Existing URLs will no longer work. This action cannot be easily undone.
moveL1ToL0.hint: Move this subspace to a different Space. It will remain at Level 1. All community members, leads, admins, organizations, and virtual contributors will be removed. Existing URLs will no longer be valid. Community members can be reinvited after the move if chosen below.

moveL1ToL2.confirmWarning: This will move the subspace under the selected subspace in another Space and demote it to Level 2. ALL community roles will be cleared, including admins. Existing URLs will no longer work. This action cannot be easily undone.
moveL1ToL2.disabledHasChildren: Cannot demote to L2: this subspace has L2 sub-subspaces (would exceed max depth).
moveL1ToL2.hint: Move this subspace under a subspace in a different Space. It will be demoted to Level 2. ALL community roles will be cleared, including admins. Existing URLs will no longer be valid. Community members can be reinvited after the move if chosen below.
moveL1ToL2.noL1Targets: No subspaces available in the selected Space.

spaceConversion.noConversions: L0 (top-level) spaces cannot be converted to a different hierarchy level.

promoteL1ToL0.confirmWarning: This will promote the subspace to a top-level space. The innovation flow will be reset to defaults. Admin roles will be reset.
promoteL1ToL0.hint: Community members and leads are preserved. Innovation flow will be reset to platform defaults. Child sub-subspaces are automatically promoted to subspaces.

promoteL2ToL1.confirmWarning: This will promote the sub-subspace to a subspace. Admin roles will be reset.
promoteL2ToL1.hint: Lightweight conversion. All community members and leads are preserved. Admin roles will be reset.

spaceConversion.sectionDescription: Change the hierarchy level of a space. Resolve a space URL to see available operations.
spaceConversion.urlForbidden: Access denied. You don't have permission to view this resource.
spaceConversion.urlNotSpace: URL does not resolve to a space.

transferCallout.confirmWarning1: Ensure the same Innovation State (e.g., Home) exists in the space you are transferring the $t(common.post) to.
transferCallout.confirmWarning2: Note that any existing links to this $t(common.post) in activity or notifications may become broken.
transferCallout.confirmWarning3: If the $t(common.post) contains Virtual Contributions and the particular Virtual Contributor is not part of the target space, the $t(common.post) will be broken.
transferCallout.confirmWarning4: The executing user becomes the new $t(common.post) creator. Non-default tagsets will be deleted and classification values will be reset to the target defaults.
transferCallout.missingTransferAccept: Missing TransferResourceAccept privilege on target calloutsSet
transferCallout.missingTransferOffer: Missing TransferResourceOffer privilege on source calloutsSet
transferCallout.sectionDescription: Move a $t(common.post) to a different space. Contributions are preserved, but the creator will change to you and non-default tagsets will be removed.
transferCallout.urlNotCallout: URL does not resolve to a $t(common.post)
transferCallout.urlNotSpace: URL does not resolve to a space

transferHub.confirmWarning: This will transfer the $t(common.customHomepage) to the selected account. Ensure the target account has the necessary privileges.
transferHub.sectionDescription: Move a $t(common.customHomepage) to a different account. Only the ownership changes — content remains unchanged.
transferHub.urlForbidden: Access denied. You don't have permission to view this resource.
transferHub.urlNotHub: URL does not resolve to a $t(common.customHomepage).

transferPack.confirmWarning: This will transfer the $t(common.innovationPack) to the selected account. Ensure the target account has the necessary privileges.
transferPack.sectionDescription: Move a $t(common.innovationPack) to a different account. Only the ownership changes — templates remain unchanged.
transferPack.urlForbidden: Access denied. You don't have permission to view this resource.
transferPack.urlNotPack: URL does not resolve to a $t(common.innovationPack).

transferSpace.confirmWarning1: After the transfer, ensure the new owner (or organization Admins) are added as admins in the community.
transferSpace.missingTransferAccept: Missing TransferResourceAccept privilege on the target account
transferSpace.missingTransferOffer: Missing TransferResourceOffer privilege on the space's account
transferSpace.notL0Space: Only L0 (top-level) spaces can be transferred
transferSpace.sectionDescription: Transfer an L0 space to a different account. Community members, content, and structure remain unchanged — only the account ownership is updated.
transferSpace.spaceUrlPlaceholder: Paste L0 space URL or path
transferSpace.urlNotSpace: URL does not resolve to a space
transferSpace.urlNotUserOrOrg: URL does not resolve to a user or organization

transferVc.confirmWarning: This will transfer the virtual contributor to the selected account. Ensure the target account has the necessary privileges.
transferVc.sectionDescription: Move a virtual contributor to a different account. Only the ownership changes — configuration remains unchanged.
transferVc.urlForbidden: Access denied. You don't have permission to view this resource.
transferVc.urlNotVc: URL does not resolve to a virtual contributor.
transferVc.urlPlaceholder: Paste virtual contributor URL or path

dialog.reasonHelp: Justification for this change, e.g. a support-ticket reference. Recorded in the audit trail.
dialog.sessionWarning: This is an administrative change. It ends the user's active sessions — they must sign in with the new email address afterwards.
dialog.title: Change login email

drift.banner: This user's last email change was only partially applied. Resolve it to return the account to a consistent state.
drift.resolveDescription: Choose which address should be this user's canonical login email.
drift.resolveSuccess: The account was reconciled. Its login email is now {{email}}.

errors.alkemioWriteFailed: The change could not be completed. No changes were made — you can try again.
errors.conflict: This email address is already in use.
errors.driftDetected: The change was only partially applied. Use the Resolve action to reconcile this account.
errors.driftNotFound: There is no outstanding drift to resolve for this user.
errors.driftResolutionFailed: The account could not be reconciled. Please try again.
errors.generic: The change could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.kratosUnreachable: The identity service is currently unavailable. Please try again shortly.
errors.kratosWriteFailed: The change could not be completed. No changes were made — you can try again.
errors.noChange: The new email is the same as the current login email.
errors.subjectNotFound: This user has no login identity that can be changed.
errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission to perform this action.

history.empty: This user has no email-change history.
history.title: Email-change history

outcomes.spaceAdminNotificationFailed: Committed — space admin notification not sent

rowAction.disabledTooltip: Only platform administrators can change a user's login email.

emailChange.success: Login email changed to {{email}}. The user has been notified by email.

validation.mismatch: The email addresses do not match.
validation.unchanged: The new email must be different from the current login email.

vcConversion.alreadyConverted: This virtual contributor is already knowledge-base-based. No conversion needed.
vcConversion.confirmWarning: This will convert the virtual contributor from space-based to knowledge-base-based. Callouts will be MOVED from the source space (not copied). This action cannot be undone.

communities.noMembership: Not a $t(common.member) of any $t(common.space) or $t(common.subspace) yet.

verification-required.message:
Du bist fast dabei... Ein letzter Schritt ist, deine E-Mail zu bestätigen.
Bitte überprüfe deinen Posteingang für eine E-Mail mit Anweisungen.

Wenn Sie keine E-Mail erhalten haben, klicken Sie auf diesen Link, um erneut zu senden.

virtualContributorProfile.bokIngestStarted: Body of Knowledge ingestion started. It may take a few minutes to complete.

delete.confirmationText: Are you sure you want to delete this $t(common.whiteboard)? The action is irreversible.

AUTO.description: We'll automatically generate the best preview from your $t(common.whiteboard) content.
AUTO.title: Auto Preview

CUSTOM.description: Choose exactly which part of your $t(common.whiteboard) to show as a preview.
CUSTOM.title: Manual Selection

FIXED.description: Take a screenshot of your $t(common.whiteboard) to use as preview. This screenshot will not update as you update your board.
FIXED.title: Fixed Selection

previewSettings.subtitle: Choose how your $t(common.whiteboard) preview appears in posts and $t(common.spaces).
previewSettings.title: Preview Settings

whiteboard.unsuccessful-save:
{{warningMessage}} Unable to save changes. Last saved: {{datetime}}.

If this issue persists, please contact the team. To avoid losing progress, click the menu in the top-left corner to save your $t(common.whiteboard) to your local disk.

whiteboardDisconnected.lastSaved: The content of this $t(common.whiteboard) was last saved {{lastSaved}}.
whiteboardDisconnected.message: Apologies for the inconvenience! The $t(common.whiteboard) isn't available for editing right now, possibly due to a network issue or loss of access. Please try closing and reopening the $t(common.whiteboard) or refreshing the page. If the issue persists, reach out to your $t(common.space) $t(common.admin) for assistance.
whiteboardDisconnected.offline: You are currently offline. The $t(common.whiteboard) will try to reconnect when you are back online.
whiteboardDisconnected.title: $t(common.Whiteboards) connection lost

removeConfirm.description: „{{name}}“ wird beim Speichern entfernt. Diese Aktion kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden.
removeConfirm.title: Diese Referenz entfernen?

alkemio.defaultMessage: Ich dachte, dieser {{entity}} könnte dich interessieren: {{url}}
alkemio.description: Sende einen Link zu diesem {{entity}} als private Nachricht an andere Alkemio-Nutzer.

errors.sendFailed: Nachricht konnte nicht gesendet werden. Bitte versuche es erneut.

alkemio.searchPlaceholder: Nutzer nach Name oder E-Mail suchen
alkemio.warning: Die Empfänger sehen deinen Namen als Absender.

errors.UNKNOWN: We couldn't update guest access. Please try again.

guest-access.label: Guest access
guest-access.toggle-description: Let anyone with the guest link view and contribute to this $t(common.whiteboard).

share-dialog.warning: Bitte beachten Sie, dass Ihre persönliche E-Mail für den Benutzer sichtbar ist, wenn Sie ihm eine Nachricht senden.

confirmDeletion.description: Do you want to delete this {{entity}}? This action is irreversible. All $t(common.profile) information will be removed and people will no longer be able to interact with the {{entity}}

virtualContributorSpaceSettings.infoTextBoK: Select the $t(common.subspace) you want as a body of knowledge for this $t(common.virtualContributor)
virtualContributorSpaceSettings.name: Namen
virtualContributorSpaceSettings.noSubspacesInfo: Create a $t(common.subspace) first, and populate it with the relevant information for your $t(common.virtualContributor).
virtualContributorSpaceSettings.placeholder: This $t(common.virtualContributor) is based on its own curated $t(common.collection) of documents, text, and links.
